title: Re-Disruption
description: Blocks have gravity. Floating trees and questionable architecture are no more!
body:
Overview:

Disruption is a mod that applies gravity to blocks if they aren't properly supported.

This allows for cave-ins, and ensures that your builds obey the laws of gravity!

Redisruption aims to port this mod to new versions.

Additional Information:

Redisruption must be installed on the server. Client installation is optional.

This port will only be for Quilt. However the license allows anyone to make Fabric or Forge ports of Disruption or Redisruption.

Disruption for 1.18.X and below



Disruption is heavily inspired by Enviromine
